nasb.text: Is it right for You indeed to oppress, To reject the labor of Your hands, And to look favorably on the schemes of the wicked?

esv.text: Does it seem good to you to oppress, to despise the work of your hands and favor the designs of the wicked?

cnv.text: 壓迫無辜， 又棄絕你手所作的， 卻喜悅惡人的計謀，你都以為美嗎？

ccb.text: 难道你喜悦压迫、鄙视你造的人， 却青睐恶人的计谋？
